title: Built an AI stock screener that monitors smart money on X and SEC Filings. So far it's called the multiple long / short trades with gains between (11% and 39%).
author: alphabee_9
selftext:
**I built a dashboard that scans thousands of posts on X across the US stock market to surface the best trade ideas.** 

It called the Bitcoin bottom when everyone was posting doom and gloom. It flagged the precious metals short at peak euphoria. It also spotted the Netflix  long setup when fear hit hardest before earnings.

These trade calls are timestamped on our webpage and X account.

* SLV Short 27/01/2026 at $100. Current price $61 for a gain of $39/share (39%)
* BTC Long 05/02/2026 at $60,000. Current price $70,497 for a gain of $10,497/share (17%)
* NFLX Long 22/02/2026 at $82.5. Current price $91.82 for a gain of $9.32/share (11%)

The system identifies mean reversion opportunities amid panic. It surfaces liquidity vacuums before they unwind. It spots post-earnings dips as entry windows.

The difference between watching charts and building a competitive edge is having a system that identifies +EV trade opportunities first.

**AlphaBee Proprietary Scoring**

I didn’t want to just throw random tickers at users. I wanted a curated high conviction daily watchlist. Here’s how our algorithms works:

Trade Idea Score: Parses a curated list of accounts on X to identify whether a trade idea has been mentioned. It then measures how many of those accounts agree with the idea and ranks it higher when there is stronger consensus. The model penalises risky or weak stock tickers and rewards stability.

Just wanted to share this as I am sure there are redditors here who are interested and have used other vibe-coded dashboards and can offer feedback.
